transcript.text:
[It's here....]
[Ground pork Jjajangmyun (black bean noodles)]
I love noodles so much
[Noodles are going in...]
[Nonstop]
Me eating 10 packs of noodles is like...
You guys eating 1~2 servings?
[10 servings of ground pork jjajangmyun mukbang starting now!]
Hello everyone
I have the Uni (Ground pork) Jjajangmyun from The Mishik
This is sponsored
[About 15 minutes ago]
[Cooking the Jjajangmyun]
[Cook the noodles first]
[Only like 10 packs...]
[Boil boil]

[Dump out all of the water]
[Use a strainer so you don't lose the noodles!]
[Sauce]
The color is unusual
It's brown and not black
[Traditional stir-fried black bean sauce]
It says to cook for 7~8 seconds
[Vegetable oil to finish it off]
These have 2 packs inside
Open it like this
It has the noodles and the sauce just like this
Also the vegetable oil
Let's eat before it gets soggy
Bon appetit
[The visuals...]
This tastes different for sure

This tastes like the real thing
The noodles and the sauce really make it a ground pork jjajangmyun
Green onion kimchi
[Time to fuel]
This type of jjajangmyun is different because it doesn't have big chunks of meat like the original dish
The sauce has ground meat and vegetables
I like these more than the original Jjajangmyun
The sauce doesn't look any special at first
But you get to taste everything once you bite into it
The noodles are very soft
I can taste this distinct flavor
Like a high-end jjajangmyun dish flavor
Tasty
I've also done a mukbang for The Mishik before
I really like that this company doesn't use any artificial flavoring (MSG)
I get to think more about my health as I age

So they use the real ingredients for these instant noodles with no MSG added
Delicious
The sauce is different
The sauce tastes great
It's very earthy(?)
I love noodles so much
It goes well with the green onion kimchi
This would've been perfect with fried eggs What a bummer
It's really good
Most of the Jjajangmyun meal kits are frozen
But these are stored at room temperature
There's an explanation here
The rich and deep taste of authentic Jjajang sauce made by adding the know-hows of Chinese traditions to the original recipe of Jjajangmyun that was invented 60 years ago in Korea
Finely ground domestic pork and vegetables, separately stir-fried chunjang (black bean paste) and Jjajang sauce which is delivered straight into the package
The chewy and soft taste of Chinese-style noodles made by kneading, aging, and deep frying the dough with our own chicken and vegetable broth
Fried noodles?

These are fried noodles
The noodles are soft
Yum
I would've never imagined meal kits to be this tasty
The world is now a better place
Because the meat is ground up, you get to taste more meat compared to eating big chunks of meat
[A noodle-ghost that eats 5 slurps of noodles in 1 bite]
Me eating 10 packs of noodles is like...
You guys eating 1~2 servings?
With green onion kimchi
Yay
I have a lot of them now
I'm going to eat it often
I love how I can feel and taste the meat Since I love meat
From what I know, Jjajangmyun has a lot of MSG inside
Luxurious hotels don't use MSG in Jjajangmyun either

It's really interesting how they don't use MSG
It's gorund meat but there are some chunks this big
There's not much left
10 packs is not as much as you think
It's cool that it comes out in a box like this
It's unique Is that why it's Uni Jjajang?
I'm sorry
Let's finish it up now
It may look like the noodles are bloated because it's been sitting here for too long
But it's still very tasty
The noodles are soft
I feel like putting white rice into this type of sauce would be delicious too
The leftover sauce
Let's bring a spoon
Wait This works!
This is so satisfying

The sauce is coming off really easily
Perfect
Saucy Jjajangmyun
This is great
[Ahjussi sounds]
That was a great meal
I loved how it was very flavorful even without any MSG
And I really enjoyed the texture of the ground meat and vegetables in the sauce
[Thanks everyone] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
